examples: By the end of Wednesday, Forester was spent.
Forester has long believed the U.S. is at a crossroads.
Michael Geisen is thirty-five years old. He was a forester.
Forester Boykin said it's worth it to conserve such a large tract of land and water.
Forester Jean Francois Pagot admits that the most valuable species are being depleted because they're not being replanted.
